examples: Nearly a decade ago it was predicted that viewers of "Friends", a popular sitcom, would soon be able to purchase a sweater like Jennifer Aniston's with a few taps on their remote control.

The show that spawned the most spin-offs was US sitcom All in the Family.
Ironically, the show itself was based on the British sitcom Till Death Us Do Part.
